differential_diagnoses: Common Variable Immunodeficiency (CVID) with granulomatous-lymphocytic interstitial lung disease (GLILD)
next_steps: Perform dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry to evaluate for NADPH oxidase function
Order lymphocyte subset analysis and immunoglobulin levels (IgG, IgA, IgM)
Perform targeted genetic testing for CGD (e.g., CYBB mutation analysis)
Initiate or optimize long-term antimicrobial prophylaxis (e.g., trimethoprim-sulfamethoxazole and itraconazole)
Review history for signs of immunodeficiency and familial patterns of recurrent pyogenic infections
Avoid starting corticosteroids until an underlying immunodeficiency or occult infection is formally ruled out
